hero.role: AI Engineer · Data Engineer · MIS Student
hero.description: Building intelligent systems and data pipelines — from raw data to production ML models. Based in Giza, Egypt.

about.label: Who I Am
about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: A passionate AI & Data Engineering student turning raw data into production-ready ML systems.
about.bio1: I'm <accent>Ahmed Ayman Soliman</accent>, an AI Engineer and Data Engineering student at MSA University (MIS), Giza, Egypt — currently maintaining a <accent>3.63 GPA</accent>.
about.bio2: I specialize in building end-to-end intelligent systems: from cleaning messy raw datasets to deploying computer vision models in production. I've worked on real-world projects across machine learning, computer vision, data analytics, and ETL pipeline development.
about.bio3: With hands-on internship experience at Encryptcore and Elevvo Pathways, and active training under Egypt's Digital Pioneers Initiative (DEPI), I bring both academic rigor and practical engineering depth to every project I take on.
about.bio4: Currently open to internships and freelance opportunities where I can apply my skills in AI and data engineering to real business problems.
